import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const AboutPage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [visible, setVisible] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { window.scrollTo(0, 0); setTimeout(() => setVisible(true), 100); }, []); return (
{/* Hero Banner */}
{/* Back button */}
About Us

Healing Centered on You

Learn about our mission, philosophy, and the team behind JK Physiotherapy & Rehab.

{/* Stats */}
{[['15+', 'Years of Excellence'], ['80+', 'Specialist Therapists'], ['10000+', 'Lives Changed'], ['98%', 'Success Rate']].map(([num, label]) => (
{num}
{label}
))}
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Left Text */}

Who We Are

At JK Physiotherapy & Rehab, we believe recovery is more than treating symptoms — it's about understanding the whole person. Our team of certified physiotherapists brings together decades of combined expertise to craft individualised treatment plans that address the root causes of pain and dysfunction.

Our holistic approach integrates manual therapy, exercise rehabilitation, patient education, and the latest evidence-based modalities. We are committed to empowering patients with the knowledge and tools to sustain long-term wellness far beyond their time with us.

{/* Highlights Grid */}
{highlights.map(([bold, light]) => (
{bold}
{light}
))}
{/* Right Card */}

Our Philosophy

Every patient deserves exceptional, personalised care. We measure our success not in sessions completed, but in lives transformed and movement restored.

Why Choose Us

What Makes Us Different

{[ { icon: '🏥', title: 'Multi-Branch Network', desc: 'Clinics across Rajasthan and Gujarat, making expert care accessible wherever you are.' }, { icon: '👨‍⚕️', title: 'Certified Specialists', desc: 'All our therapists are MAPT certified with advanced degrees and international training.' }, { icon: '🏠', title: 'Home Visit Service', desc: 'Can\'t come to us? Our therapists come to you — same expert care, at your home.' }, { icon: '📋', title: 'Personalised Plans', desc: 'Every patient receives a fully customised treatment plan based on their unique condition and goals.' }, { icon: '🔬', title: 'Evidence-Based Care', desc: 'Our treatments are grounded in the latest clinical research and rehabilitation science.' }, { icon: '❤️', title: 'Patient-First Approach', desc: 'We measure success in lives transformed and movement restored — not just sessions completed.' }, ].map((item, i) => (
